languages.text: {n}Ксенос с металлическим скрежетом поворачивает голову к вам.{/n} "Слышу, ничтожное творение древнего врага постигло крупицу великого. Рвение ограниченного разума поразительно, пусть и бесполезно, и способно забавлять до поры".

{n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."
languages.original_text: {n}Ксенос с металлическим скрежетом поворачивает голову к вам.{/n} "Слышу, ничтожное творение древнего врага постигло крупицу великого. Рвение ограниченного разума поразительно, пусть и бесполезно, и способно забавлять до поры".

{n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."

{n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."

languages.text: {n}伴随着金属摩擦声，异形将头转向你。{/n}“我听见了——古老仇敌那卑贱的造物，竟也窥得了伟大之道的一星半点。受限心智的狂热值得称道，虽属无意义之举，却足以提供片刻消遣。”
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."

traits.locale_text: {n}伴随着金属摩擦声，异形将头转向你。{/n}“我听见了——古老仇敌那卑贱的造物，竟也窥得了伟大之道的一星半点。受限心智的狂热值得称道，虽属无意义之举，却足以提供片刻消遣。”

languages.text: {n}Un chirrido metálico llena la sala cuando el xenos gira la cabeza hacia tu dirección.{/n} «Veo que la miserable creación de nuestros antiguos enemigos ha llegado a comprender una parte insignificante de nuestra grandeza. El fervor de esta mente limitada es tan sorprendente como vano. Por ahora, resulta entretenido».
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un chirrido metálico llena la sala cuando el xenos gira la cabeza hacia tu dirección.{/n} «Veo que la miserable creación de nuestros antiguos enemigos ha llegado a comprender una parte insignificante de nuestra grandeza. El fervor de esta mente limitada es tan sorprendente como vano. Por ahora, resulta entretenido».

languages.text: {n}Le xénos tourne la tête vers vous dans un grincement métallique.{/n} « J'ai cru comprendre que la création inférieure de notre ancien adversaire avait perçu une étincelle de grandeur. Le zèle d'un esprit limité est remarquable, quoique futile, mais devrait au moins nous amuser quelque temps. »
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le xénos tourne la tête vers vous dans un grincement métallique.{/n} « J'ai cru comprendre que la création inférieure de notre ancien adversaire avait perçu une étincelle de grandeur. Le zèle d'un esprit limité est remarquable, quoique futile, mais devrait au moins nous amuser quelque temps. »

languages.text: {n}Zeno, metalik bir gıcırtı sesiyle başını sana doğru çeviriyor.{/n} "Kadim düşmanın adi yaratımı, yüceliğin bir zerresini kavramış. Sınırlı bir zihnin gayreti dikkat çekici, beyhude olsa da şimdilik keyif verebilir."
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zeno, metalik bir gıcırtı sesiyle başını sana doğru çeviriyor.{/n} "Kadim düşmanın adi yaratımı, yüceliğin bir zerresini kavramış. Sınırlı bir zihnin gayreti dikkat çekici, beyhude olsa da şimdilik keyif verebilir."

languages.text: {n}Der Xenos wendet sich mit einem metallischen Knirschen dir zu.{/n} "Ich höre, das niedere Werk des alten Feindes hat einen Hauch von Größe erlangt. Der Eifer eines beschränkten Verstandes ist bemerkenswert, aber sinnlos und durchaus amüsant."
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Xenos wendet sich mit einem metallischen Knirschen dir zu.{/n} "Ich höre, das niedere Werk des alten Feindes hat einen Hauch von Größe erlangt. Der Eifer eines beschränkten Verstandes ist bemerkenswert, aber sinnlos und durchaus amüsant."

languages.text: {n}異形は金属的な軋み音を立てて頭をこちらに向けた。{/n}「古き敵の卑劣な創造物が偉大なる一端を理解したと聞く。限られた心の熱意は、無駄ではあっても、今は娯楽を提供するのに十分だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."
